decision_question: Which bounded route should govern the next action after post-R9 reconciliation proves that all ten historical I10 items still require current disposition?

routes.label: Revised ten-item disposition contract first
routes.result: later preparation only of one bounded current I10-001-through-I10-010 disposition contract
routes.authority_effect_if_selected: authorizes contract preparation only; no I10 decision, R9 evaluation, implementation, or downstream action
routes.risk: the later contract may expose additional item-specific dependencies and require further bounded gates

routes.label: R9 evaluation-authority decision first
routes.result: later preparation only of a separate decision contract on whether bounded symbolic R9 evaluation may be proposed under Step 10
routes.authority_effect_if_selected: authorizes decision-contract preparation only; does not authorize evaluation and does not disposition any I10 item
routes.risk: more work on S10R-BLOCK-006 may not reduce the historical-decision blocker that directly stops Step 10 closeout

routes.label: Blueprint rule block
routes.result: declare Blueprint block: rule missing and hold before evaluation, implementation, or historical-item disposition
routes.authority_effect_if_selected: no new technical or production authority
routes.block_effect_if_selected: all three blocks remain active; a separately approved Blueprint rule change would be required
routes.risk: Step 10 and all downstream work remain stopped

recommendation_reason: Resolve the historical Step 10 decision blocker before spending more time on an unevaluated symbolic field whose authority cannot itself disposition the ten I10 subjects.
